examples: The discharged obligation must be secured by the property you repossess.
They had come to repossess their goods.
I've been authorised by the court to repossess this property.
You may enjoy driving it and may have no idea Johnny owes the IRS. Even so, the IRS can repossess it.
But that's not easy with a big bank seeking to repossess his modest, three-bedroom townhome in Miami -- and two law firms to deal with.
